headings.usage: Use for all H1-H3, hero text, and price displays. Letter spacing should be tight (-0.02em).

body.usage: Use for paragraphs, UI elements, labels, and small text. Excellent for numbers.

rules: NEVER use pure black (#000000) for backgrounds. Use #0F0F10.
Use Gold (#D4AF37) strictly for CTAs, prices, and active states. Do not overuse.
Text should never be pure white. Use #F5F5F0 for primary text to reduce eye strain.

glassmorphism.style: background: rgba(22, 22, 24, 0.7); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
glassmorphism.usage: Use for sticky headers, search bars, and booking summary widgets.

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise overlay (opacity 0.03) recommended for background to add 'paper' feel to the dark mode.

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-[#0F0F10] hover:bg-[#E5C158] font-semibold rounded-none tracking-wide uppercase text-sm px-8 py-4 transition-all duration-300
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#D4AF37] text-[#D4AF37] hover:bg-[#D4AF37] hover:text-[#0F0F10] rounded-none uppercase text-sm px-8 py-4

cards.property: group relative overflow-hidden bg-[#161618] border border-transparent hover:border-[#D4AF37]/30 transition-all duration-300
cards.feature: bg-[#161618] p-8 border border-white/5 hover:border-[#D4AF37]/20 transition-colors

inputs.style: bg-[#161618] border-b border-white/20 focus:border-[#D4AF37] rounded-none px-0 py-3 text-[#F5F5F0] placeholder:text-white/30 focus:ring-0 focus:outline-none transition-colors
inputs.label: text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-[#D4AF37] mb-2 block

hero_background.alt: Infinity pool overlooking the Mediterranean sea at sunset

interior_feature.alt: Luxury interior living room with ocean view

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. SETUP: Install fonts immediately in index.css. Use Playfair Display for all headings.
2. THEME: Force dark mode default. The app should feel like a 'night mode' luxury magazine.
3. HEADER: Create a transparent header that becomes solid #0F0F10 on scroll.
4. COMPONENTS: Do NOT use rounded-xl. Use sharp corners (rounded-none) or very subtle rounding (rounded-sm) to match the 'Sharp Luxury' aesthetic.
5. SEARCH: The search widget on the hero must use the glassmorphism style defined above.
6. IMAGES: Use 'object-cover' for all images. Ensure hero images have a black overlay (opacity 30-50%) so white text is readable.
7. DATA: All property data will come from Guesty API, but use the provided Unsplash images for the landing page static sections.
8. TESTING: Add data-testid to all buttons, inputs, and links.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements.
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖 etc.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
